name: Lesley Gore
abstract: Lesley Gore (born Lesley Sue Goldstein, May 2, 1946 – February 16, 2015) was an American singer, songwriter, and actress. At the age of 16, she recorded her first hit song "It's My Party", a U.S.

concerts.label: The New York Pops Third Birthday Gala Celebration

about_quotes.speaker: Quincy Jones
about_quotes.evidence: I found Leslie Gore. ... We had 18 hits with Leslie. ... That’s his first song. It was a hit. Two minutes and eleven seconds with Leslie Gore. We put it in the album.
about_quotes.doc_title: Quincy Jones — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
